title: PhysisForcing: Physics Reinforced World Simulator for Robotic Manipulation
innovation_summary: PhysisForcing: Physics Reinforced World Simulator for Robotic Manipulation: Building on this observation, we propose PhysisForcing, a scalable training framework that strengthens physical consistency by focusing supervision on physics-informative regions through joint optimization of pixel-level.
